scripts.dev:
mkdir -p logs && npm run dev:api > logs/api.log 2>&1 & npm run dev:landing < /dev/null > logs/landing.log 2>&1 & echo 'Dev servers started
  API:     http://localhost:8787
  Landing: http://localhost:8788

Run npm run log to watch output'
scripts.log:prod:stop: pkill -f 'wrangler tail' 2>/dev/null && echo 'Production log stopped' || echo 'No production log running'
scripts.status: echo "API (8787): $(lsof -ti:8787 >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'running' || echo 'stopped')" && echo "Landing (8788): $(lsof -ti:8788 >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'running' || echo 'stopped')" && echo "Prod log: $(pgrep -f 'wrangler tail' >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'running' || echo 'stopped')"
scripts.stop: lsof -ti:8787,8788 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null && echo 'Dev servers stopped' || echo 'No servers running'
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:api && npm run deploy:landing
scripts.deploy:landing: npm run build:landing && wrangler pages deploy landing/dist/ --project-name nasapicture-landing
